history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle, candid portrait of a young man with tousled dark brown hair, looking to the left with a thoughtful, slightly melancholic expression. His face is illuminated by strong, warm, late afternoon sunlight, casting dramatic shadows across his features, highlighting his sharp jawline and prominent cheekbones. He is wearing a vibrant royal blue t-shirt with dark blue overalls, the straps and buckles of which are clearly visible. The background is a rustic outdoor setting, featuring weathered wooden planks and a thick, textured wooden post. Beyond the immediate structure, the bright, clear blue sky is visible, dotted with lush green trees and a light brown wooden fence. The overall mood is one of youthful introspection and natural beauty, with a color palette dominated by warm browns, deep blues, and the golden hue of the sunlight. The style is realistic and slightly cinematic, emphasizing natural light and shadow play.
